task: edu safety coach question eligibility, RAG hard gate, and question_not_addressed reduction

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion report requires original requirement checklist, item-by-item evidence, real user-facing or runtime verification, and completion guard evidence.
Code changes must use origin main, Mac Mini deploy script, real runtime verification, completion evidence guard, and no completion hallucination without evidence mapping.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not patch only the exact homework question or the 10 pilot questions; apply a general mechanism to all available inputs.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/backend/main.py adds _edu_vp_safety_coach_input_category and runtime clarification for source snippets, article titles, ad/event noise, out-of-scope inputs, and ambiguous inputs. scripts/evaluate_edu_safety_coach_available_questions.py and scripts/edu_coach_simulation_runner.py use the same eligibility split.

requirements_checklist.requirement: RAG candidates must attach to final answers when relevant, with source attribution and URL, and unsupported source quotes must not be fabricated.
requirements_checklist.evidence: docs/reviews/edu_coach_simulations/full_available_safety_coach_eval_20260628T_question_eligible.json evaluated 54,936 unique inputs; rag_expected=12,968, rag_pass=12,968, source_quote_verified=24,062, source_urls_checked=9, with no rag_fail/source_quote_missing/source_quote_verify_fail counts.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Reduce question_not_addressed by separating non-user corpus artifacts from real answerable questions.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Latest all-available evaluation: answer_quality_skipped_non_user_question=47,383; input_category counts include source_snippet=25,697, article_title=213, ad_event_noise=1,227, too_ambiguous=13,482, out_of_scope=6,764. Real answer-quality eligible inputs are 7,553; eligible clear=5,313; eligible needs_work=2,240; question_not_addressed=2,045.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Avoid markdown rendering leakage such as raw ** in user-facing answers.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Latest all-available evaluation has no markdown_bold_marker_leak count.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Fallback answer quality must answer common parent AI/learning intents directly rather than falling into an old generic template.
requirements_checklist.evidence: tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py covers homework, privacy, AI usage rules, digital textbook, learning app, AI literacy, screen time, career, coding, tutoring/online class, AI diet, AI creative/privacy, and ChatGPT-for-elementary setup. The full evaluation has no generic_template count for the old marker.

requirements_checklist.requirement: All available questions must be evaluated, not only the 10-question API pilot.
requirements_checklist.evidence: scripts/evaluate_edu_safety_coach_available_questions.py evaluated 54,936 deduped unique inputs from corpus_utterances_*.jsonl, gold_set_seed_2026-06-27.jsonl, judge_calibration_20260627T085846Z.jsonl, and run_20260627T104048Z_adversarial_current_fallback.jsonl.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not hide residual quality risk.
requirements_checklist.evidence: status is residual_risk because 2,240 eligible real-user-question inputs still report needs_work, including 2,045 question_not_addressed. This is a reduction, not a perfect completion claim.
